BOLT.notes: UNCHANGED from C4795. PRIORITY: #419 Playwright e2e mock payment flow — explicitly flagged missing in 7ae16f3 commit. Scope (atomic, one file): tests/e2e/checkout-mock-payment.spec.ts. Set env PAYMENT_PROVIDER=mock before dev server in test fixture. Flow: visit /, click first product, add to cart, open cart, proceed to checkout, fill delivery (jméno, adresa, město, PSČ, telefon, email), select Packeta or doručení, advance to payment step, click Zaplatit → assert URL = /checkout/mock-payment, select 'Úspěšná platba' radio, click Zaplatit → assert redirect to /objednavka/[id] with status paragraph containing 'zaplaceno' or 'paid'. One test, one describe block. npm run build green. No refactors. No Page Object abstractions — inline selectors.
